name: Chess Bughouse
description: Bughouse is the four-player team variant of chess — partners sit at adjacent boards playing opposite colors, and any piece you capture is handed to your partner, who can drop it onto an empty square on their board on a future turn. Two clocks tick in parallel, every move ricochets across both boards, and a tactical blunder on one side hands your opponent ammunition for the other. The fastest, loudest, most chaotic flavor of chess.
